title: Aylith catalog manifest frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter of a repo's .aylith/project.md. The catalog collector (aylith-com) reads this to build the tool's catalog card + detail page. The Markdown body below the frontmatter becomes the long-form detail content.

name.description: Display name of the tool, e.g. "Gitdex".

category.description: One of the seven curated categories. Omit / use a manifest-less repo to land in "uncategorized".

status.description: Maturity stage. "planning" renders the catalog's amber placeholder state.

features.description: Key feature bullets shown in the detail sidebar.

featured.description: Surface as a large card on the home page + catalog. Defaults to false.

order.description: Ascending display order across the whole portfolio. Unset sorts after ordered tools, then alphabetically by name.

icon.description: SVG stroke path (the `d` attribute) for the tool's icon. Defaults to a generic glyph if omitted.

gradientFrom.description: Accent gradient start, a hex color. Defaults to #6366f1.

gradientTo.description: Accent gradient end, a hex color. Defaults to #818cf8.
